name: Constraints
ONET occupations
ESCO occupations
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///esco_occupations_tech_clean.csv' AS row
MERGE (e:EscoOccupation {esco_occ_uri: row.esco_occ_uri})
SET
  e.label = row.label,
  e.description = row.description,
  e.isco_group = row.isco_group,
  e.code = row.code;

name: ONET-ESCO crosswalk
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///onet_esco_occ_crosswalk_tech_clean.csv' AS row
MATCH (o:OnetOccupation {soc_code: row.soc_code})
MATCH (e:EscoOccupation {esco_occ_uri: row.esco_occ_uri})
MERGE (o)-[r:CROSSWALK_TO]->(e)
SET r.match_type = row.match_type;

name: ESCO skills
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_esco_skills_tech.csv' AS row
MERGE (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.esco_skill_uri})
SET
  s.label = row.label,
  s.skill_alternative_label = row.skill_alternative_label,
  s.skill_type = row.skill_type,
  s.is_digital = row.is_digital,
  s.is_transversal = row.is_transversal,
  s.is_digcomp = row.is_digcomp;

name: Skill categories
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_skill_categories_tech.csv' AS row
MERGE (c:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.category_uri})
SET
  c.name = row.name,
  c.code = row.code,
  c.level = toInteger(row.level),
  c.parent_uri = row.parent_uri,
  c.parent_name = row.parent_name;

name: Category hierarchy
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_skill_category_edges_tech.csv' AS row
MATCH (child:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.child_category_uri})
MATCH (parent:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.parent_category_uri})
MERGE (child)-[:SUBCATEGORY_OF]->(parent);

name: ESCO occ-skill
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_esco_occ_requires_skill_tech.csv' AS row
MATCH (e:EscoOccupation {esco_occ_uri: row.esco_occ_uri})
MATCH (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.esco_skill_uri})
MERGE (e)-[r:REQUIRES_ESCO_SKILL]->(s)
SET
  r.relation_type = row.relation_type,
  r.skill_type_in_occ = row.skill_type_in_occ;

name: Sanity1-counts
query: MATCH (n) RETURN labels(n) AS labels, count(*) AS count;

name: Sanity2
Sanity3-Skillcat_counts
lvl0 skill cat link
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_esco_master_tech.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.skill_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.skill_uri) <> ''
  AND row.skill_l0_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.skill_l0_uri) <> ''
MATCH (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.skill_uri})
MERGE (c0:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.skill_l0_uri})
SET
  c0.name = coalesce(c0.name, row.skill_l0_label),
  c0.code = coalesce(c0.code, row.skill_l0_code),
  c0.level = 0
MERGE (s)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c0);

name: lvl1 skill cat link
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_esco_master_tech.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.skill_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.skill_uri) <> ''
  AND row.skill_l1_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.skill_l1_uri) <> ''
MATCH (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.skill_uri})
MERGE (c1:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.skill_l1_uri})
SET
  c1.name = coalesce(c1.name, row.skill_l1_label),
  c1.code = coalesce(c1.code, row.skill_l1_code),
  c1.level = 1
MERGE (s)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c1);

name: CustomRole constraints
CustomRole Nodes
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///custom_roles.csv' AS row
MERGE (r:CustomRole {role_id: row.role_id})
SET
  r.role_title = row.role_title,
  r.family = row.family,
  r.seniority = row.seniority,
  r.description = row.description,
  r.aliases = row.aliases,
  r.source = row.source;

name: CustomRole RoleFamily
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///custom_roles.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.family IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.family) <> ''
MERGE (f:RoleFamily {name: row.family})
WITH row, f
MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_id: row.role_id})
MERGE (r)-[:IN_FAMILY]->(f);

name: CustomRole-ESCO occ mapping
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///custom_role_esco_map.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.role_id IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.role_id) <> ''
  AND row.esco_occ_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.esco_occ_uri) <> ''
MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_id: row.role_id})
MATCH (e:EscoOccupation {esco_occ_uri: row.esco_occ_uri})
MERGE (r)-[m:MAPS_TO]->(e)
SET
  m.confidence = toFloat(row.confidence),
  m.match_type = row.match_type,
  m.reason = row.reason,
  m.esco_occ_label = row.esco_occ_label;

name: Visualize end-to-end
query:
MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_id: $role_id})-[m:MAPS_TO]->(e:EscoOccupation)
WITH r, e, m
ORDER BY m.confidence DESC
LIMIT 1
MATCH (e)-[rel:REQUIRES_ESCO_SKILL]->(s:EscoSkill)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:SkillCategory)
RETURN DISTINCT r, m, e, rel, s, c
LIMIT 50;

name: Setting role to visualize
query: :param role_id => 'CR01';

name: Loading L2 and L3 skillCat
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_skill_categories_specific_l2_l3.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.category_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.category_uri) <> ''
MERGE (c:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.category_uri})
SET
  c.name = row.name,
  c.code = row.code,
  c.level = toInteger(row.level),
  c.parent_uri = CASE
    WHEN row.parent_uri IS NULL OR trim(row.parent_uri) = '' THEN ''
    ELSE row.parent_uri
  END,
  c.parent_name = CASE
    WHEN row.parent_name IS NULL OR trim(row.parent_name) = '' THEN ''
    ELSE row.parent_name
  END;

name: hierarchy edges l3->l2, l2->l1
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_skill_category_edges_specific_l2_l3.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.child_category_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.child_category_uri) <> ''
  AND row.parent_category_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.parent_category_uri) <> ''
MATCH (child:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.child_category_uri})
MATCH (parent:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.parent_category_uri})
MERGE (child)-[:SUBCATEGORY_OF]->(parent);

name: ESCO skill specific cat linking
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///final_esco_skill_to_specific_category_l2_l3.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.esco_skill_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.esco_skill_uri) <> ''
  AND row.category_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.category_uri) <> ''
MATCH (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.esco_skill_uri})
MATCH (c:SkillCategory {category_uri: row.category_uri})
MERGE (s)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c);

name: Full neighborhood end-to-end with all skillCat
query:
MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_id: $role_id})-[m:MAPS_TO]->(e:EscoOccupation)
WITH r, m, e
ORDER BY m.confidence DESC
LIMIT 1
MATCH (e)-[rel:REQUIRES_ESCO_SKILL]->(s:EscoSkill)
WITH r, m, e, rel, s
ORDER BY CASE rel.relation_type WHEN 'essential' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.label
LIMIT 15
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:IN_CATEGORY]->(c:SkillCategory)
OPTIONAL MATCH (c)-[:SUBCATEGORY_OF]->(parent:SkillCategory)
RETURN DISTINCT r, m, e, rel, s, c, parent;

name: Constraints for course, cert
Course Nodes
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///coursera_skill_catalog_flat.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.course_url IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.course_url) <> ''
  AND row.esco_skill_uri IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.esco_skill_uri) <> ''
MATCH (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.esco_skill_uri})
MERGE (c:Course {url: row.course_url})
SET
  c.title = row.course_title,
  c.program_type = row.program_type,
  c.level = row.level,
  c.provider = row.provider,
  c.query = row.query,
  c.skill_label = row.skill_label,
  c.result_index = toInteger(row.result_index),
  c.result_count = toInteger(row.result_count)
MERGE (c)-[:TEACHES_SKILL]->(s);

name: Cert nodes
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///google_cloud_certifications_by_role_flat.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.url IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.url) <> ''
  AND row.custom_role IS NOT NULL AND trim(row.custom_role) <> ''
MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_title: row.custom_role})
MERGE (c:Certification {url: row.url})
SET
  c.cert_key = row.cert_key,
  c.name = row.cert_name,
  c.tier = row.tier,
  c.page_title = row.page_title,
  c.meta_description = row.meta_description
MERGE (r)-[:RELEVANT_FOR]->(c);

name: Create rel from metrics csv
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///customrole_esco_skill_metrics.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.role_id IS NOT NULL AND row.esco_skill_uri IS NOT NULL

MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_id: row.role_id})
MATCH (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.esco_skill_uri})

MERGE (r)-[rel:HAS_SKILL_METRIC]->(s)

SET
  rel.skill_importance = toFloat(row.skill_importance),
  rel.skill_rank = toInteger(row.skill_rank),
  rel.is_top20 = row.is_top20,
  rel.skill_overlap_count = toInteger(row.skill_overlap_count),
  rel.mapping_confidence = toFloat(row.mapping_confidence),
  rel.relation_type = row.relation_type;

name: Add threshold properties to rel
query:
LOAD CSV WITH HEADERS FROM 'file:///customrole_skill_thresholds.csv' AS row
WITH row
WHERE row.role_id IS NOT NULL AND row.esco_skill_uri IS NOT NULL

MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_id: row.role_id})
MATCH (s:EscoSkill {esco_skill_uri: row.esco_skill_uri})
MATCH (r)-[rel:HAS_SKILL_METRIC]->(s)

SET
  rel.minimum_required = toInteger(row.minimum_required),
  rel.favorable_target = toInteger(row.favorable_target),
  rel.threshold_reason = row.threshold_reason;

name: CustomRole->SkillMetrics->ESCOSkill
query:
MATCH (r:CustomRole {role_id: "CR01"})-[rel:HAS_SKILL_METRIC]->(s:EscoSkill)
RETURN r.role_title, s.label, rel.skill_importance, rel.minimum_required, rel.favorable_target
ORDER BY rel.skill_rank
LIMIT 25;
